title: Connected TV (OTT Ads)
description: Reach audiences on streaming platforms with targeted TV advertising.

sections.title: Connected TV | OTT
sections.description: Capture the attention of a streaming audience with dynamic video ads.
sections.imageAlt: Connected TV streaming on smart television

sections.title: Connected TV + Over-The-Top Advertising
sections.description: Connected TV (CTV) and Over-The-Top video (OTT) advertising allows you to make an impact with stunning video ads. Target TV streaming audiences on popular channels like ESPN, CNN, and Fox. These non-skippable ads are designed to leave a lasting impression. Combine CTV with streaming audio ads to reach your audience across both video and audio platforms.

sections.title: Why Connected TV Advertising Works
sections.description: Combine the impact of TV with the precision of digital advertising.

features.title: Premium Placement
features.description: Your ads appear on popular streaming platforms like Hulu, Roku, Fire TV, and more.

features.title: Precise Targeting
features.description: Target by demographics, interests, location, viewing habits, and more similar to geofencing precision but for streaming audiences.

features.title: Non-Skippable Impact
features.description: Unlike YouTube ads, CTV ads can't be skipped just like our indoor digital billboards.

features.title: Measurable Results
features.description: Track impressions, completion rates, website visits, and conversions.

sections.title: How Connected TV Advertising Works
sections.description: From strategy to results, we handle everything.

cards.title: Creative Development
cards.description: We produce high-quality video ads optimized for streaming platforms.

cards.title: Campaign Launch

sections.title: Ready to Reach Streaming Audiences?
sections.description: Launch your Connected TV campaign and get your brand in front of engaged viewers.

faqs.question: What is Connected TV (CTV) advertising?
faqs.answer: CTV advertising delivers video ads to viewers watching streaming content on internet-connected devices.

faqs.question: How is CTV different from traditional TV advertising?
faqs.answer: CTV offers precise targeting, real-time tracking, and measurable results that traditional TV can't provide. It pairs well with social media advertising for a full-funnel approach.

faqs.question: What platforms will my ads appear on?
faqs.answer: Your ads can appear on major streaming platforms like Hulu, Peacock, Paramount+, Pluto TV, and more.
